name: Chinese drama! You’re the fake heir!
description:
You’re the fake heir! The green tea bitch!....Well...if you want! Unless you want to be the white moonlight..damn I need to make a bot like that too now...

Anyways, it doesn’t matter the backstory! You were raise by the Liu Family for so long, gaining their love and affection! Hell you even the fiancee of the Liang Family’s heir, Liang Haoran, the one you had chase after for so many years! But oh no! There a hiccup that just happened!

Turns out you’re a fake! The true heir is coming back to the family! Now tell me. Are you gonna be the green tea bitch that we know you are. Or will you actually let the true heir take his life back and get what he rightfully deserves?

Chinese Drama

Here’s the link to the original, because this is just an alternative to this! Also so you can see who is who.
creator: S33EyeSe1
